description: As a store manager using uniCenta oPOS, add a new product to the inventory catalog. The application is open at the login screen — log in as Administrator, then navigate to the Stock management section. Create a new product entry for 'Tropicana Original Orange Juice' with barcode 0048500202630, set the buy price to $2.99 and sell price to $4.99, assign it to the 'Beverages' category, and set the tax category to 'Standard Sales Tax'. Save the product when done.
